description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners, finished in a deep blue color. The front features a large, edge-to-edge black glass touchscreen with a subtle notch at the top, likely housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back panel is also blue and glossy, displaying a prominent triple-lens camera array in the upper left corner, each lens encircled by a metallic ring, and a small flash. A reflective Apple logo is centered on the back, indicating the brand. The sides are flat and metallic, with visible buttons and a SIM card slot, contributing to a premium, minimalist aesthetic. The device appears thin and lightweight, typical of high-end smartphones, and is designed for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, blue modern smartphone with a large black touchscreen, triple rear cameras, and a reflective Apple logo on the back. The device features flat metallic sides and a minimalist, premium design.
description_view_0: Front and back of the blue smartphone are visible, showing the large black screen with a notch and the triple camera array with Apple logo on the glossy back.
description_view_1: Side view of the smartphone, highlighting its thin profile, flat metallic edges, and the placement of side buttons and SIM slot.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, showing both the front screen and the back with the camera array and Apple logo, emphasizing the device's symmetry.
description_view_3: Another side view, mirroring view 1, displaying the slimness and straight edges of the phone, with button and slot placements visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A reflective silver Apple logo is centered on the back panel.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is dark, with no visible content, icons, or interface elements; it appears to be turned off or in standby mode.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array located in the top left corner on the back, arranged in a triangular pattern with a flash module nearby.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the sides, including a volume rocker and a power button, with a SIM card slot also present.
